system.description:
What it does (SRD): If the creature hits with a listed natural weapon, it can attempt to start a grapple as a free action without provoking attacks of opportunity. Details (size modifiers, opposed checks, holding vs pinning) follow the grapple rules.

ThirdEra: This template has no numeric rows in Mechanical effects or Capability grants. Track grapple state in play; use the NPC’s natural attacks and CMB/CMD from the sheet when resolving the grapple.
